title: Tinyland Spoke lanes.json
description: Normative schema for .github/lanes.json in any repo spawned from tinyland-inc/site.scaffold. Source of truth for per-spoke CI lane matrix, Blahaj PR-env provisioning, and Flywheel RBE binding. See docs/CI-SCHEMA.md for the full contract.

$schema.description: Editor support hint pointing at this schema. Tolerated; ignored by the validator.

$comment.description: Free-form comment. Tolerated; ignored by the validator.

schema_version.description: Schema major version. Bumped on breaking changes; migration notes in docs/CI-SCHEMA-CHANGELOG.md.

name.description: Spoke slug. Used in DNS, image tags, S3 state prefix, and Blahaj event_type.

domain.description: Spoke brand domain. PR-env DNS is templated as pr-{PR_NUMBER}-{LANE}.<domain>.

image_repository.description: GHCR repository for per-PR images. Defaults to ghcr.io/<repo-owner>/<spoke.name> resolved at workflow time.

defaults.description: Per-lane field defaults. Each lane may override.

ttl_hours.description: Default PR-env TTL. Per-PR override via label `lane-ttl/<N>d` or `lane-ttl/keep` (capped at 720h).

flywheel_target_classes.description: Proved REAPI target classes the spoke may invoke with --config=flywheel-executor. Must be a subset of the allowlist enum. See docs/CI-SCHEMA.md §5.

runnerClass.description: GitHub Actions runs-on label: an org-namespaced capability class — `<org-pool>` prefix + one of `-nix`, `-nix-heavy`, `-nix-kvm`, `-nix-gpu`, `-docker`, `-dind` (e.g. `tinyland-nix`, `great-falls-tool-bus-nix`) — or `ubuntu-latest`, which is permitted only for jobs whose entire purpose is a `gh api` call. Cluster classes require a runner-pool grant: tinyland pools via tinyland-infra/modules/spoke/runner-binding; tenant pools via the org's own infra stack (TIN-2353).

laneTrigger.description: When the lane provisions. `pull_request` is the canonical ephemeral-env trigger; `merge_main` and `release_tag` create longer-lived envs; `manual` requires workflow_dispatch.

provedTargetClass.description: Mirrors tinyland-inc/GloriousFlywheel/config/rbe-target-eligibility.json at the tag this schema was cut against. `web-playwright-chromium-static-smoke` is candidate-status and will be rejected at runtime until promoted in a future schema bump.

name.description: Lane slug. Used in DNS (`pr-{PR_NUMBER}-{name}.<spoke.domain>`), in caller-selected status names, and as the S3 state suffix when `tofu_state_suffix` is unset. The v2 `ci/lane/<name>` default is a legacy build-status name, not proof that a runtime environment exists; coordinated consumers may opt build evidence into `ci/build/<name>`.

theme.description: Brand theme key (typically under src/lib/styles/themes/) consumed by the runtime via the Blahaj dispatch payload's lane.theme field.

snapshot_source.description: Static projection snapshot identifier validated by `just validate-static-projection`. Examples: `tinyland://pulse/m1`, `checked-in`, or a full URL.

e2e.description: If true, the lane is included in the tailnet-qa matrix. Fixes the MassageIthaca asymmetric-E2E pain point: E2E inclusion is per-lane data, not workflow-hardcoded.

ttl_hours.description: Per-lane TTL override. Per-PR label override (`lane-ttl/<N>d`) takes precedence.

tofu_state_suffix.description: Appended to S3 state key: `<spoke>/<pr_number>/<suffix>/`. Defaults to lane.name. Never references rustfs (hard invariant).

flywheel_target_classes.description: Per-lane proved REAPI target class allowlist. Must be a subset of defaults.flywheel_target_classes if both are set.

extra.description: Free-form lane-specific metadata propagated into the Blahaj dispatch payload's lane.extra. Must be JSON-serializable.
